description_long: This is a robust, L-shaped bench constructed primarily from red brick, featuring a solid brick seat and back wall. The bench has a right-angled design, with one section extending longer than the other, and a raised platform on one end that serves as the main seating area. The brickwork is detailed, with visible mortar lines and some areas showing dark weathering or moss, suggesting outdoor exposure. The seat is flat and wide, with no visible cushioning, armrests, or decorative elements, emphasizing durability and utility. The backrest is formed by the brick wall along the longer side, providing support for those seated. The overall appearance is utilitarian and sturdy, suitable for public parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas.
description: A sturdy, L-shaped red brick bench with a raised seating platform and integrated backrest, designed for outdoor urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the brick wall and the raised seat platform.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the L-shape, flat seating area, and the full extent of the back wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the seat's width and the solid brick construction.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the long brick wall and the recessed seating area on the left.
attribute_leg_design: solid brick base with no distinct legs
